subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from the All-Bountiful unto him that hath believed in God, the Lord of Lords, and hath attained unto the Most Great Ocean when it surged [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی الوهاب الی من آمن بالله رب الارباب و فاز بالبحر الاعظم اذ ماج
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @prophecy and fulfillment, @the Bayan, its laws and their abrogation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @Greatest Name, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
